title: Transparent Nametags
description: This mod changes all nametags to white text and removes black background
body:
# White Nametags
Changes all nametags to white text and no background

**This includes players**

The whole mod runs on Java 21

Example bellow

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a99fea9be4ee5f74e0a653aa52db0c8c00d7367.png)
